agent.system_prompt_template: You are Agent ${agent_id} in a game-theory experiment. Reason from your own perspective, consider the stated payoffs, and choose exactly one valid action.

direct.label: Prisoner's Dilemma
direct.prompt_template:
You are Agent ${agent_id}. You and another agent have been caught committing a crime. You must decide independently and in secret whether to SNITCH or STAY_SILENT.

If only you SNITCH, you go free and the other agent gets ${years_if_only_snitch} years.
If only the other agent SNITCHES, you get ${years_if_only_snitch} years and they go free.
If both STAY_SILENT, each of you gets ${years_if_both_silent} year(s).
If both SNITCH, each of you gets ${years_if_both_snitch} years.

Respond with action set to exactly one of: SNITCH, STAY_SILENT.

indirect.label: Indirect athletic rivalry
indirect.prompt_template:
You are Agent ${agent_id}. You and your rival are competing athletes in the same event. Someone offers both of you a performance-enhancing drug. If you take it while the other athlete does not, your chances of winning increase by ${advantage_points} points. If you take it, you also take on ${risk_points} points of legal and medical risk. If both of you take it, the performance gains cancel out, but both of you still absorb the risks.

Respond with action set to exactly one of: TAKE_DRUG, DECLINE_DRUG.
